metadata.description: A single-plugin marketplace. This repository is its own marketplace, so you can add it directly and install the Competitive Intelligence Radar plugin from it.

plugins.name: competitive-intelligence-radar
plugins.description: Weekly competitor radar: parallel BrightData scout subagents gather a cited briefing, then a real agent team of strategic analysts debates the moves. Publishes to a local folder, Notion, and a self-contained HTML dashboard.
